allow: Bash(python -c "import hashlib; import requests; pw='password'; h=hashlib.sha1\(pw.encode\(\)\).hexdigest\(\).upper\(\); print\(f'Hash: {h[:5]}...{h[5:10]}'\); r=requests.get\(f'https://api.pwnedpasswords.com/range/{h[:5]}', timeout=5\); print\(f'Status: {r.status_code}'\); print\(f'Response size: {len\(r.text\)} bytes'\); lines=r.text.splitlines\(\); print\(f'Lines: {len\(lines\)}'\); found=[l for l in lines if l.startswith\(h[5:]\)]; print\(f'Found: {found[:1] if found else \\"Not found\\"}'\)")
